prompt: Generate a meme with the first image of a man (Mozart) rolling his eyes placed above the second image sequence of SpongeBob from the second reading and burning a paper labeled (you should write this in the white paper in the bottom left of the second image) 'Chapter 2: Methodology – 20 pages of nonsense'. Add the caption fo the meme: 'When you reread your thesis and realize setting it on fire is your most productive academic decision'.
prompt_refined: Generate a two-panel meme. The top panel should use image 1, featuring Mozart rolling his eyes. The bottom panel should use the entire 4-panel sequence from image 2, which depicts SpongeBob interacting with a paper. Specifically, superimpose the text "Chapter 2: Methodology – 20 pages of nonsense" onto the blank white paper held by SpongeBob in the top-left sub-panel of image 2. Below the entire two-panel composite image, add the meme caption: "When you reread your thesis and realize setting it on fire is your most productive academic decision".
objects: Mozart rolling eyes (in the top panel)
SpongeBob (appearing in four distinct poses in the bottom panel's sequence)
Blank white paper (held by SpongeBob in the top-left sub-panel of the bottom panel)
Text "Chapter 2: Methodology – 20 pages of nonsense" (superimposed on the blank paper)
Paper being torn/crumpled (in the bottom panel's sequence)
Two-panel composite structure (with top and bottom panels)
Meme caption: "When you reread your thesis and realize setting it on fire is your most productive academic decision" (below the composite image)
